caption: The video begins with a close-up, out-of-focus shot of city lights at night, featuring blurred white and red bokeh circles against a dark sky. As the sequence progresses, the camera zooms out and shifts focus to reveal a wide nighttime landscape. A distant city skyline is visible along the horizon, with small, twinkling yellow and white lights reflecting on a dark body of water in the foreground. In the distance, the dark silhouettes of hills or mountains rise against a hazy, dark brownish-grey sky. No people, clothing, or legible text are visible in any of the frames. The scene transitions from a highly blurred abstract view of lights to a clear, wide panoramic view of a coastal city under a night sky.
